ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "scoring_system" TEXT /* Scoring system used in the league */,
  "draft_settings" TEXT /* Draft settings for the league (e.g., draft order, rounds) */,
  "commissioner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commissioner of the league */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the league is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team logo */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the owner */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the owner (e.g., commissioner, owner, player) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the roster belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player on the roster */,
  "drafted" REAL /* Percentage of teams that drafted the player */,
  "slot_position" TEXT /* Slot position of the player on the roster */,
  "injured_reserve" INTEGER /* Whether the player is on injured reserve */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that made the pick */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player picked */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of the draft */,
  "pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the round */,
  "draft_date" TEXT /* Date of the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics belong to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistics belong to */,
  "points" REAL /* Points scored */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Rebounds grabbed */,
  "assists" REAL /* Assists made */,
  "steals" REAL /* Steals made */,
  "blocks" REAL /* Blocks made */,
  "turnovers" REAL /* Turnovers committed */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three point percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matchups" (
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matchup */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the game */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matchup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, strain, fracture) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "article" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
